hero.title: Find a verified specialist — risk-free, stress-free
hero.subtitle: Compare ratings, read verified reviews and contact the best financial advisors and real estate agents near you. Completely free of charge.

problem.title: Finding a specialist shouldn't be a gamble
problem.subtitle: You know the feeling. You need an advisor, but don't know where to start.

trust.title: You don't know who to trust
trust.description: Everyone on the internet claims to be an expert. But who really is? How do you tell a professional from an amateur?

time.title: You waste time on meetings
time.description: You meet with an advisor, and only after an hour you realize it's not the right fit. How much time have you already wasted like this?

fees.title: You're afraid of hidden fees
fees.description: How much will it really cost? Will there be hidden commissions? And who's responsible if things go wrong?

verified.title: Verified specialists

reviews.title: Real reviews

free.title: 100% free for customers
free.description: Searching, comparing and contacting specialists is completely free for customers. No hidden fees.

noStrings.title: No obligations
noStrings.description: Send an inquiry with no strings attached. You can say no at any time — nobody's forcing you into anything.

ctaSpecialist.title: Are you a financial advisor or real estate agent?
ctaSpecialist.subtitle: Join the platform where quality clients are waiting for you

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start
faq.q1: Is finding a specialist really free?
faq.a1: Yes, the platform is 100% free for customers. We charge no fees for searching, comparing or contacting specialists.
faq.a2: Every specialist goes through verification — we check professional qualifications, experience and references. Nobody who doesn't meet our standards gets on the platform.
faq.q3: What if I'm not happy with a specialist?
faq.a3: You have no obligation. The inquiry is non-binding and you can contact another specialist at any time. You can also write to us and we'll help you find a better solution.
faq.q4: Can I contact multiple specialists at once?
faq.a4: Of course. We recommend reaching out to 2-3 specialists and comparing their approach, prices and references. That's how you find the best one for your situation.
faq.q5: How are you different from Google search?
faq.a5: On Google you'll find thousands of results with no quality guarantee. With us, all specialists are verified, have real client reviews and you can easily compare them in one place.
faq.q6: Do I need to register to search?
faq.a6: No, searching and browsing profiles is available without registration. You only need to register to send an inquiry.

finalCta.title: Stop searching blindly
finalCta.subtitle: Find a verified specialist today — it's free and takes 2 minutes.

features.catalog: Listing in the catalog and search results

yearly.name: Annual membership
yearly.description: Full access at a discounted rate — save €100/year

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, the difference is calculated on a pro-rata basis. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle.
faq.a2: All plans are billed monthly. Payment is processed automatically via Stripe at the start of each billing period.
faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no commitment. You will retain access until the end of your paid period.
faq.q4: What is the difference between the monthly and annual plan?
faq.a4: The annual plan includes everything in the monthly plan plus exclusive bonuses (webinars, VIP support, account manager). You also save €100 per year compared to monthly billing.
faq.q5: Is it possible to try before purchasing?
faq.a5: We do not currently offer a trial period, but you can purchase any plan and cancel at any time without penalty.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of professionals already using our platform

metadata.title: Contact | tvujspecialista.cz
metadata.description: Contact us with questions about the tvujspecialista.cz platform.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: tvujspecialista.cz is a modern platform connecting customers with verified specialists in finance and real estate. Our goal is to simplify the process of finding trusted professionals and to help service providers grow.

why.title: Why we were founded
why.p1: We noticed that finding a quality specialist — whether for a mortgage, insurance or investments — is often a lengthy and stressful process. Customers do not know who to trust, and specialists struggle to find an effective way to acquire new clients.
why.p2: That is why we created a platform that simplifies this process for both sides.
